concept: Dating is just red flags disguised as hobbies.
title: Funny Dating Humor Shirt - Red Flags Disguised as Hobbies T-Shirt for Singles
description:
Dating these days feels like a scavenger hunt where all the clues lead to heartbreak and confusion. This hilariously on-point design reminds us that hobbies like 'traveling' or 'entrepreneurship' might just be creative ways of hiding a suitcase full of red flags. Relatable, sarcastic, and perfect for your next single-life rant session. 

Perfect for:
- Singles navigating the minefield of dating apps.
- Friends who laugh through the chaos of modern romance.
- Anyone who’s heard 'my passion is crypto' on a first date.

DETAILS:
- Typography-led design with sharp humor.
- Available in a full range of colors to pop against light or dark backgrounds.
- Made-to-order, with crisp linework and vibrant accents that match the wit on display.

100% Airlume combed and ring-spun cotton (Bella Canvas 3001) — lightweight 4.2 oz/yd² (142 g/m²) for breathability
Retail crew neckline with ribbed knit collar and shoulder tape for shape retention
Side seams and tear-away label for fit stability and comfort
Vibrant, crisp printing: DTF or DTG depending on provider for detailed sleeve/label prints
Ethically sourced/REACH certified; blank product sourced from Honduras; multiple fabric blends for heathered colors

Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)
Non-chlorine: bleach as needed
Tumble dry: low heat
Iron, steam or dry: medium heat
Do not dryclean

Shipped by BanterWearCo. Questions? Message me — I respond faster than a teenager asked to take out the trash. (Low bar, admittedly.)
